channel.title: Combined Politepol Feed
channel.description: Merged feed from multiple Politepol sources

item.title: Influencers claim shilajit is a 'natural testosterone booster'. What does science say?
The Word of the Week is Supreme Leader — the power centre of Iran, who controls it all
How CAA gave Indian citizenship to Hindu woman born in Bangladesh
This Week in Explainers: A guide to the war in West Asia as it enters Day 9
Is Balendra Shah as next Nepal PM good news for India?
Karnataka to link excise duty to alcohol content: Will liquor get cheaper?
Nepal seeks a new deal: For Balen, it’s a crown of thorns
item.description: The election result reflects deep frustration with decades of political instability, corruption, nepotism and youth unemployment. The message is clear – perform or perish

item.title: Multan’s lost Prahladpuri temple: Tracing Holi’s origins and a city’s Hindu past
item.description: Once the sacred site linked to the legend of Prahlad and the origins of Holi, Multan’s Prahladpuri Temple today stands as a forgotten reminder of the city’s erased Hindu past

item.title: Raisina takeaway: America wants India to counter China, but never as a global peer
item.description: The remark by US Deputy Secretary of State Christopher Landau at the Raisina Dialogue should be read for what it was: a rare moment of diplomatic candour. Washington wants Bharat as a partner against China, but it does not want ‘another’ China

item.title: Iran, America and politics of pre-emption: When imminence is enough to launch a war
item.description: If the United States can launch a war based on projected capability and ideological distrust, why should others not invoke similar reasoning?

item.title: Nepal polls: Gen Z wave sweeps old guard as Balen Shah heads for historic mandate
item.description: Balen Shah appears to be achieving what no Nepali leader has in three decades—securing a two-thirds majority. The real challenge now is delivering on promises and shedding Nepal’s 'basket case' image in South Asia

item.title: India’s tightrope walk: Preserving strategic autonomy amid the Iran war
item.description: India must perform a delicate balancing act to maintain its critical defence and technology ties with Israel while simultaneously protecting its long-term energy and trade interests with Iran
